description:
*PLEASE NOTE: Excluded Live Content*
MVPD - ASG and Postseason
Partner - AppleTV+, Peacock etc
Blackouts - In-market games, ESPN Sunday Night Baseball
gherkin:
Given the user is logged into mlb.com/tv
And the user has MLBALL and SUBSCRIBERVOD entitlements
When the user selects any out of market content for playback
Then the user receives successful playback of that content
